name: Oseng-Oseng Wortel (Stir Fried Carrots)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 green or red chili (or 1 pinch of chili powder)
4 tablespoons good stock or 1 tablespoon dark soy sauce and 4 tablespoons water
2 tablespoons vegetable oil or clarified butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, wash, and cut the carrots into small sticks.
2. Slice the shallots and chili.
3. Crush the garlic.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil or clarified butter in a wok.
5. Sauté the sliced shallots and chili for 1 minute.
6. Add the crushed garlic to the wok and stir continuously for about 1 minute.
7. Add the carrots to the wok and stir for another minute or so.
8. Pour in the stock (or dark soy sauce mixed with water) and cover the pan.
9. Cook on low heat for 4 minutes, then uncover and taste. Add salt if necessary.
10. Continue cooking for a further 2 minutes while stirring constantly.
11. Serve hot.
Makes 2 servings.
